zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Eure於1361年之前出生在英國達勒姆維頓 勒 維亞爾時，他的父親John de Eure II23歲，母親Isabella Clifford20歲。他於1372年5月6日之前與Isabella Atholl在英國越可爾巴福斯 霍爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1422年3月12日在英國達勒姆韋斯特 奧可藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Eure于1361年之前出生在英国達勒姆維頓 勒 維亞爾时，他的父亲John de Eure II23岁，母亲Isabella Clifford20岁。他于1372年5月6日之前与Isabella Atholl在英国越可爾巴福斯 霍爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1422年3月12日在英国達勒姆韋斯特 奧可藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Eure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ewer
meanings: English (Hertfordshire, Middlesex, and Buckinghamshire): occupational name from Middle English ewere, a shortened form of ewerer ‘servant who supplied guests at the table with water to wash their hands’. The word ewerer is itself a derivative of Old French and Middle English ewer ‘water pitcher’, also recorded in Middle English as ower. Compare Lower .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Eure was born before 1361, in Witton le Wear, Durham, England, his father, John de Eure II, was 23 and his mother, Isabella Clifford, was 20. He married Isabella Atholl before 6 May 1372, in Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 March 1422, in West Auckland, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Eure est né avant 1361, à Witton le Wear, Durham, Angleterre, son père, John d’Eure II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabella Clifford, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabella Atholl avant 6 mai 1372, à Barforth Hall, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1422, à West Auckland, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Eure vor 1361 in Witton le Wear, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Eure II 23 und seine Mutter Isabella Clifford 20. Er hat vor 6. Mai 1372 in Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, England Isabella Atholl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. März 1422 in West Auckland, Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Eure è nato il prima del 1361 nel Witton le Wear, Durham, England, il suo padre, John de Eure II, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Clifford, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabella Atholl prima del 6 maggio 1372, nel Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 marzo 1422, nel West Auckland, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Eureが1361年以前にイギリスダルハムウィットオン ル ウエアルで生まれた時，父John de Eure IIは23歳，母Isabella Cliffordは20歳であった。1372年5月6日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアバーフォース ハルでIsabella Athollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1422年3月12日にイギリスダルハムウエスト アウックランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Eure(이)가 1361년 이전 영국 뒤람 윗튼 일 위르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Eure II(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Clifford(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1372년 5월 6일 이전 영국 요르크실르 바포스 홀에서 Isabella Atholl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1422년 3월 12일 영국 뒤람 웨스트 오클랜드에서 사망했다.

mn.Witton-le-Wear, Durham, Durham, England,: Witton-le-Wear, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Eure nasceu antes 1361, em Witton le Wear, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Eure II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Clifford, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabella Atholl antes 6 de maio de 1372, em Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1422, em West Auckland, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Eure родился перед 1361 г. в местности виттон л вир, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Eure II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella Clifford, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Atholl перед 6 май 1372 г. в местности барфорт холл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 марта 1422 г. в местности вест ауккланд, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Eure nació antes de 1361, en Witton le Wear, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Eure II, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabella Clifford, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Isabella Atholl antes de 6 de mayo de 1372, en Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1422, en West Auckland, Durham, Inglaterra.
